summary: Interactive mode prompt for /forge:init implemented. forge/commands/init.md gains Mode Selection section, mode-specific pre-flight tables, --fast/--full flag handling with conflict detection, and resume-time stored-mode sub-prompt with skipped-phase advancement. forge/init/sdlc-init.md fast-mode detection now reads mode from .forge/init-progress.json (no longer branches on $ARGUMENTS) and Phase 1 propagates the value into config.json. CHANGELOG.md gains an [Unreleased] entry. All 286 tests pass.
